user.title: Connect to Eniris SmartgridOne
user.description: Enter the Eniris account that has access to your SmartgridOne controllers.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Eniris. Please try again later.
error.two_factor_required: This Eniris account requires two-factor authentication, which is not supported by this integration yet.

abort.already_configured: This Eniris account is already configured.
